provenance.definitions: H_l(s)=prod_i (s - q_i c/r_src)/(s - q_i c/r_ref); q_i = reverse Bessel roots; digital via bilinear K=2Fs, no prewarp; DC gain (r_ref/r_src)^l. Bass-boost (audible) direction; see gen_bessel_roots.py for the sign derivation.
references: Daniel (2003), Spatial sound encoding including near field effect
